global.title: The v6 reactor replaced legacy hardcoded subgraphs with a reactor subgraph at /graphql/r and auto-generated per-model subgraphs
global.content: The v6 Reactor introduced three subgraph types: the reactor subgraph (`/graphql/r`) for drives, documents, sync, and subscriptions; auto-generated document-model subgraphs (`/graphql/<model-name>`) with namespaced queries/mutations per registered model; and custom user-defined subgraphs. Document-model subgraphs auto-generate `document(identifier)`, `documents(paging)`, `findDocuments(search)`, `documentChildren(parentIdentifier)`, `createDocument(name)`, and per-operation mutations (e.g., `addTodoItem(docId, input)`) with async variants. Legacy strand-based sync (`registerPullResponderListener`, `system.sync.strands`) was replaced with channel-based sync (`touchChannel`, `pollSyncEnvelopes`) and GraphQL subscriptions (`documentChanges`).
global.description: Legacy /graphql/document-drive and /graphql/system merged into /graphql/r; each document model gets its own namespaced subgraph.
